pi_items.metadata_value: Users (Profiles) can befriend each other via 'HasFriend' graph edges
pi_items.verified_value: True - HasFriend edge class is created in schema (seed_demodb.py line 83) and is used to create social connections between Profiles
pi_items.source: seed_demodb.py lines 83 (edge class definition) and 360-378 (edge creation between profiles)

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on DemoDB, a verified travel agency graph database with social features. The database includes real countries, hotels, and restaurants with accurate data. Two specific Profiles are seeded and verified to exist: (1) domi@nek.gov (Isaac Black, American, born 1982-07-14) and (2) seari@ubu.edu (Rosie Thornton, British, born 1990-11-03). The Profiles class has Email as a UNIQUE STRING property indexed for fast lookups. The HasFriend edge class is implemented for creating social connections between profiles. Database access uses root credentials (GymAnything123!) and is available at http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html. The task requires creating a HasFriend edge from domi@nek.gov to seari@ubu.edu.
